instruction: The GitHub logo has a bad tint, heavy outline, and a stray slash through it. Restore the clean original mark.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/github.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #3b82f6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="4"><path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/></g>
  <line id="stray-slash" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="5" x1="20" y1="108" x2="108" y2="20" />
</svg>
